actual_column_names: 2011年、2016年及2021年按種族、婚姻狀況及性別劃分的15歲及以上少數族裔人士百分比分布

irregularities.label: MULTI_LEVEL_HEADER
irregularities.details: The headers span multiple rows, indicating a hierarchical structure with overarching category labels and sub-labels.

irregularities.label: SPARSE_ROW_FILL
irregularities.evidence: Rows 7-42, particularly the use of blank cells to carry forward values in the "年份  \nYear" column.
irregularities.details: For various ethnic groups, the year is filled once and left blank for subsequent rows until a new block begins.

irregularities.label: METADATA_ROWS
irregularities.details: These rows contain title, subtitles, and footnotes, which are not part of the main dataset and exist outside the data structure.
